§306
(306) uhari suto madhu pritamo satalakhā 
sṃ yaśodhara ddāu/…hariama sṃ gṃgārāma 
ddāu/ madhusuto uṃmāika: khāuāla sṃ 
raghupati suta lakṣmīkānta dāu…budhavāla 
sṃ dāmodara ddāu/ umāī sutā vṃśīdhara 
rudī dharmadattā: khāuāla s ṃ mahīsuta 
dayārāma dāu pabāuli s ṃ paduma ddāu/ 
vṃśīdhara suto bhāilāla: pālī s ṃ medhākara 
suta keśava dāu (B. 37) dariharā sṃ veṇī 
ddāu/ bhāilāla sutā kha ṇḍabalā sṃ 
uṃmāpati suta ṭekana dāu…ekaharā sṃ 
nehāla ddāu/ (305) yānū pra. yanārdana 
suto muralī ve. hemanātho pālī sṃ rāma suta 
pradyumnanātha dāu…sakarā ḍʰaī sṃ 
rāmadeva ddāu/ muralī suto śivadatta 
bhavānīdatto mā ṇḍara sṃ purandara suta 
gonū dāu…khaṇḍabalā sṃ ghāru ddāu/ 
śivadatta suta ḍomana: ghusāuta sṃ theghu 
suta yānakī nātha dāu…dariharā s ṃ 
kulānanda ddāu/ ḍomana suto dāmodara: 
valiyāsa sṃ cilakā suta kalānātha dāu (B 
61//6)kara. kiśāurī ddāu/ dāmodara suto 
maheśvara parameśvaro satalakhā sṃ rudī 
suta raghunātha dāu hemanātha suto 
baccāka: vṛdhavāla sṃ lakṣmana suta 
dinabandhu dāu velau ṃca sṃ govinda 
ddāu/ baccā sutā…vudhavāla s ṃ narapati 
suta rudrapati dāu…ekaharā s ṃ aniruddha 
vāvū lāla
ṭhā.

rudī dharmadattā: khāuāla s ṃ mahīsuta 
dayārāma dāu pabāuli s ṃ paduma ddāu/ 
vṃśīdhara suto bhāilāla: pālī s ṃ medhākara 
suta keśava dāu (B. 37) dariharā sṃ veṇī 
ddāu/ bhāilāla sutā kha ṇḍabalā sṃ 
uṃmāpati suta ṭekana dāu…ekaharā sṃ 
nehāla ddāu/ (305) yānū pra. yanārdana 
suto muralī ve. hemanātho pālī sṃ rāma suta 
pradyumnanātha dāu…sakarā ḍʰaī sṃ 
rāmadeva ddāu/ muralī suto śivadatta 
bhavānīdatto mā ṇḍara sṃ purandara suta 
gonū dāu…khaṇḍabalā sṃ ghāru ddāu/ 
śivadatta suta ḍomana: ghusāuta sṃ theghu 
suta yānakī nātha dāu…dariharā s ṃ 
kulānanda ddāu/ ḍomana suto dāmodara: 
valiyāsa sṃ cilakā suta kalānātha dāu (B 
61//6)kara. kiśāurī ddāu/ dāmodara suto 
maheśvara parameśvaro satalakhā sṃ rudī 
suta raghunātha dāu hemanātha suto 
baccāka: vṛdhavāla sṃ lakṣmana suta 
dinabandhu dāu velau ṃca sṃ govinda 
ddāu/ baccā sutā…vudhavāla s ṃ narapati 
suta rudrapati dāu…ekaharā s ṃ aniruddha 
lakṣmīnātha
ṭhā.
